title: poa matsumurae
intro: Poa matsumurae, also known as Japanese meadow-grass or matsumura's meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and providing relief from colds and other respiratory issues. Poa matsumurae is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
